title: taraxacum promontoriorum
intro: Taraxacum promontoriorum, also known as the New Zealand dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, containing taraxasterol, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum promontoriorum include its potential to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and protect against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum promontoriorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
